overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian urban environment. The player descends a concrete ramp into an abandoned lot, passes NPCs near a food stall, and continues down a deserted city street toward a construction site with industrial cranes.

events.description: turns left and descends from concrete platform into the open lot

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp into an abandoned urban lot with a biohazard van and derelict vehicles

armored van with yellow biohazard symbol parked in the lot
derelict silver sports car with broken windows
large blue cylindrical tanks with metal framework
tall modern building with teal glass facade and orange accents
multi-story building with yellow and orange paneling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated concrete walkway overlooking a dusty abandoned lot. The player descends a ramp, turning left toward a biohazard van parked near derelict vehicles. Tall modern buildings with colorful facades rise in the background under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned dirt lot with overgrown vegetation

events.description: approaches group of NPCs sitting near a food stall in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through overgrown dirt terrain toward a group of NPCs gathered near a makeshift food stall

notable_agents.action: sitting on a red chair next to a food cart, facing the camera

entered.detail: dry dirt surface with scattered trash bags and overgrown weeds
blue and black garbage bags scattered on the ground
chain-link fence with concrete barriers running along the left side
small makeshift food vendor shack with orange counter
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: Walking through a desolate dirt lot with overgrown vegetation and scattered trash. The camera approaches a small group of NPCs sitting near a food stall. A graffiti-covered wall runs along the left side while the colorful city buildings remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: deserted city street with palm trees

events.description: turns right from dirt lot onto paved city street

agents.ego_description: turning onto a deserted asphalt street and walking past abandoned vehicles and palm trees

entered.detail: deserted two-lane road with faded lane markings
long concrete barrier covered in colorful graffiti tags
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
derelict cars and trucks parked along the right sidewalk
tall red construction cranes visible in the distant skyline

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a paved city street as the camera turns right from the dirt lot. The player walks down a deserted road lined with palm trees on the left and abandoned vehicles on the right. A graffiti-covered wall runs parallel to the street while construction cranes loom in the distant skyline.

events.description: turns slightly left while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing a large deserted intersection toward an industrial construction site with tall cranes

entered.detail: painted crosswalk lines on the asphalt
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
large industrial construction site with steel frameworks
tall smokestacks and industrial structures in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player approaching a large open intersection. The camera crosses the deserted crosswalk, passing a traffic light on the right, heading toward a massive construction site with towering cranes and industrial chimneys dominating the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated concrete walkway down into a desolate urban wasteland that eventually opens into a massive industrial construction zone. It begins with a descent down a ramp toward a biohazard van and derelict vehicles, with colorful modern skyscrapers looming under a bright midday sun. As the camera moves forward, the concrete gives way to a dusty dirt lot filled with overgrown vegetation and trash, passing a graffiti-covered wall and a small group of NPCs gathered near a food stall. The scene then shifts onto a paved city street as the camera turns right, gliding past palm trees and abandoned cars while construction cranes begin to emerge in the distant skyline. Finally, the movement carries the viewer across a deserted intersection and past a traffic light, heading directly toward a horizon dominated by towering industrial chimneys and massive cranes.
